name: Greenside Golf Academy @Golf v.2 Tribeca
about: The Greenside Golf Academy at Golf v.2 Tribeca is an indoor golf training facility located at 12 Thomas Street in New York City. Founded by PGA Class A Member John Hobbins, the academy provides year-round, climate-controlled instruction using advanced technology. The facility is equipped with Trackman golf simulators, Capto Putting Technology, Blast Golf 360, and HackMotion sensors for full swing, short game, and putting analysis. The academy offers personalized coaching for players of all skill levels, from beginners to accomplished players, with programs that combine indoor instruction with outdoor practice at local facilities. John Hobbins has been named one of the top golf instructors in New York by Golf Digest Magazine for 12 consecutive years.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman technology and advanced putting systems for comprehensive game analysis
Year-round, climate-controlled training environment in NYC's Tribeca district
Personalized instruction from a PGA Class A professional with 25+ years of experience

simulator_hardware.notes: Provides club and ball flight data for full swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players can bring their own clubs or use rental options if available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The facility does not mention food or drink services, so it's best to check directly about outside food and drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With simulator technology, 18 holes can typically be played in 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Greenside Golf Academy offers programs for juniors and youth, making it suitable for kids learning the game.
